# Denis Stritar

> Berlin-based product designer. This site showcases selected product design work as case studies, with an interactive time-of-day WebGL experience.

Canonical URL: https://denisstritar.com
Sitemap: https://denisstritar.com/sitemap.xml

## Work

- [Colophon — How this site is built](/work/colophon/): a look under the hood at the time-of-day WebGL experience, the four-mood design system, and the Next.js stack.
<!-- Add each published case study here: - [Project title](/work/slug/): one-sentence summary -->

## About

Denis Stritar is a Berlin-based product designer crafting intuitive, customer-facing analytics experiences. Currently designing at Embeddable.

## Contact

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/denisstritar/
